zh.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst是John Wakehurst和Joan的兒子，於1378年之前出生在英國素可。他於1409年10月之前與Elizabeth Etchingham結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1454年1月4日在英國英格蘭素可阿爾丁格利，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可阿爾丁格利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst是John Wakehurst和Joan的儿子，于1378年之前出生在英国素可。他于1409年10月之前与Elizabeth Etchingham结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1454年1月4日在英国英格兰素可阿爾丁格利，埋葬在英国英格兰素可阿爾丁格利。

nameMeanings.name: Wakehurst
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wakehurst Place in Ardingly (Sussex).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst was born before 1378, in Sussex, England as the son of John Wakehurst and Joan. He married Elizabeth Etchingham before October 1409. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 4 January 1454, in Ardingly, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Ardingly, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst est né avant 1378, à Sussex, Angleterre, fils de John Wakehurst et Joan. Il a épousé Elizabeth Etchingham avant octobre 1409. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 4 janvier 1454, à Ardingly, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Ardingly, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst wurde vor 1378 in Sussex, England, als Sohn von John Wakehurst und Joan geboren. Er hat vor Oktober 1409 Elizabeth Etchingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Januar 1454 in Ardingly, Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ardingly, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst è nato il prima del 1378 nel Sussex, England come figlio di John Wakehurst e Joan. Lui sposato Elizabeth Etchingham prima del ottobre 1409. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 gennaio 1454, nel Ardingly, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolto a Ardingly, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurstは1378年以前にイギリススセックスでJohn WakehurstとJoanの息子として生まれた。1409年10月以前にElizabeth Etchinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1454年1月4日にイギリスイギリススセックスアルディングリーで死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスアルディングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst(은)는 1378년 이전 영국 수세스에서 John Wakehurst(와)과 Joan의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1409년 10월 이전 Elizabeth Etchingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1454년 1월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아딩리에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 아딩리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst nasceu antes 1378, em Sussex, Inglaterra filho de John Wakehurst e Joan. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Etchingham antes outubro de 1409. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de janeiro de 1454, em Ardingly, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultado em Ardingly, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst родился перед 1378 г. в местности суссекс, Англия. Его родителей звали John Wakehurst и Joan. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Etchingham перед октябрь 1409 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 4 января 1454 г. в местности ардингли, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности ардингли, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Wakehurst nació antes de 1378, en Sussex, Inglaterra como hijo de John Wakehurst y Joan. Se casó con Elizabeth Etchingham antes de octubre de 1409. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de enero de 1454, en Ardingly, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, y fue sepultado en Ardingly, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
